text.title: agents-production-deployment Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agents-production-deployment as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Deploying an agent to production without running an evaluation suite against a fixed test set.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents are non-deterministic. Without a repeatable evaluation suite, prompt or model changes that regress quality are invisible until users report failures. The evaluation suite is the regression gate.
